_comment: This is a schema reference / example. The real file is at ~/.claude/skills/quickstart/state.json
_path_note: Set by fork_pick (step 8). One of: 'ship', 'review', or null until the fork has been picked. Replaces the deprecated 'branch' field from the pre-H8 3-branch flow.
_current_step_note: The step that will run on the next /quickstart invocation. Set to 'kickoff' on first run.
_completed_steps_note: Steps whose verifier exited 0 or whose prompt explicitly marked complete. Append-only.
_skipped_steps_note: Steps explicitly skipped via the recovery menu option 3.
_preflight_passed_note: True once kickoff's first-time-here pre-flight (pwd check, tooling check, account expectations) has cleared.
_started_at_note: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the very first invocation. Set once, never overwritten.
_last_run_at_note: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp updated on every invocation.
_finished_at_note: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp set by finale.md when the adventure completes. Null until then.
_branch_answers_note: Free-form answers from the kickoff ICP question. Single field today (icp_seed). Name is legacy from the pre-H8 3-branch flow that asked 3 questions; kept for backward compat.
_coupon_shown_note: Set to true once the QS200 cohort credit code has been displayed in finale.
_status_note: Set to 'complete' when finale.md writes the closing state. Null until then.

_schema_version_history.1: Initial schema — May 2026 v1 launch (single-path flow with one fork at step 8)

icp_seed.description: Free-form ICP description from the kickoff question.
